zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Sutton of Wellingore於大約1509年出生在英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯時，他的父親Robert Sutton36歲，母親Elizabeth Boys30歲。他於1524年與Margaret Hussey在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1537年在英國林可爾史爾維林格享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Sutton of Wellingore于大约1509年出生在英国林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯时，他的父亲Robert Sutton36岁，母亲Elizabeth Boys30岁。他于1524年与Margaret Hussey在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1537年在英国林可爾史爾維林格享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Sutton of Wellingore was born about 1509, in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert Sutton, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Boys, was 30. He married Margaret Hussey in 1524, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1537, in Wellingore, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Sutton of Wellingore est né environ 1509, à Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Sutton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Boys, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hussey en 1524, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1537, à Wellingore, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Sutton of Wellingore um 1509 in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Sutton 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Boys 30. Er hat 1524 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England Margaret Hussey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1537 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wellingore, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sutton of Wellingore è nato il circa 1509 nel Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Sutton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Boys, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hussey nel 1524, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1537, nel Wellingore, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sutton of Wellingoreが約1509年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトン ビー リンコルンで生まれた時，父Robert Suttonは36歳，母Elizabeth Boysは30歳であった。1524年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでMargaret Husseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1537年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエリンゴアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sutton of Wellingore(이)가 대략 1509년 영국 링코실르 버턴 비 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Sutton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Boys(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 Margaret Hussey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1537년 영국 링코실르 웰잉어에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sutton of Wellingore nasceu aproximadamente 1509, em Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Sutton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Boys, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hussey em 1524, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1537, em Wellingore, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Sutton of Wellingore родился около 1509 г. в местности буртон би линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Sutton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Boys, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hussey в 1524 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1537 г. в местности веллингор, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Sutton of Wellingore nació aproximadamente 1509, en Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Sutton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Boys, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Hussey en 1524, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1537, en Wellingore, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
